docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MALARECKI, KRYSZTOF - CRISTOFF PAINTING & DECORATING IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT RIVAS, STEVE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,933.00 FILED BY MALARECKI, KRYSZTOF - CRISTOFF PAINTING & DECORATING AS TO DEFENDANT RIVAS, STEVE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-12-2018 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM FILED BY MALARECKI, KRYSZTOF - CRISTOFF PAINTING & DECORATING RIVAS, STEVE
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-12-2018 - JUDGMENT.
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO DEFENDANT RIVAS, STEVE
PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED IN THIS MATTER ORDERED DESTROYED - ADDED TO SEPTEMBER, 2018 EXHIBIT DESTRUCTION LIST.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $40.00) SERVED APR-16-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT RIVAS, STEVE

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-12-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-12-2018 BY JUDGE PRO TEM ANNE WONG. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ANNE WONG; CLERK: J. BERTELSEN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
